专注全球品牌海外市场内容传播与全域曝光支持。围绕海外可见度建设展开服务，帮助品牌在国际市场建立信任，实现稳定、真实的海外声量积累。 We focus on overseas content distribution and full-channel exposure for global brands. 了解我们的服务 Explore Our Services

About Us

内蒙古图瓦玛玛文化传媒 Inner Mongolia Tuvamama Culture Media

我们是一家专注于海外社交媒体营销的文化传媒公司，深耕 KOL/KOC 合作、素人矩阵分发与海外媒体发稿领域。凭借对全球主流平台的深度理解，帮助中国品牌在海外市场建立真实、持久的品牌影响力。 We are a cultural media company specializing in overseas social media marketing, with deep expertise in KOL/KOC collaborations, grassroots matrix distribution, and international media placement. We help Chinese brands build authentic, lasting influence in global markets.

4

Core Business

核心业务（4 大业务线） Core Services (4 Business Lines)

01

海外 KOL 合作Overseas KOL Partnerships

覆盖全球主流市场中大型垂类达人，提供定制化内容创作、产品测评、品牌种草等合作，快速提升品牌影响力。 Covering mid-to-large niche influencers across major global markets. We offer customized content creation, product reviews, and brand seeding to rapidly boost brand awareness.

02

海外 KOC 合作Overseas KOC Partnerships

对接海外本土小型优质达人与真实博主，以原生、可信的内容做深度种草，强化用户信任，助力品牌口碑建设。 Connecting with quality micro-creators and authentic bloggers abroad. Native, credible content drives deep brand seeding, strengthening user trust and word-of-mouth.

03

海外素人矩阵分发Overseas UGC Matrix Distribution

国内少有的海外素人分发机构，提供海量真实素人账号规模化铺发，帮助品牌低成本扩大声量，提升社媒搜索可见度。 One of the few agencies in China specializing in overseas UGC distribution. Massive scale real-user posting to expand brand reach cost-effectively and improve social search visibility.

04

海外媒体发稿（PR）Overseas Media & PR

全球权威媒体渠道发布新闻稿、产品发布、企业介绍等内容，支持 SEO 优化与 GEO 终端执行，提升品牌海外公信力与本地化曝光。 Publishing press releases, product launches, and company profiles across authoritative global media. SEO optimization and GEO execution supported to boost international credibility and local exposure.

Why Us

为什么选择我们 Why Choose Us

全球视野Global Vision

深耕欧美、东南亚等主流海外市场，熟悉各平台生态与本地用户习惯。 Deep expertise in major overseas markets including Europe, America, and Southeast Asia. Familiar with platform ecosystems and local user behavior.

真实可信Authentic & Trustworthy

坚持真实内容策略，拒绝刷量，帮助品牌建立长期可持续的海外口碑。 Committed to authentic content strategies. No fake engagement — we help brands build a sustainable long-term overseas reputation.

高效执行Efficient Execution

小团队快速响应，从方案到落地全程跟进，确保每一次合作高质量交付。 Agile team with fast response times. End-to-end follow-through from strategy to execution, ensuring high-quality delivery every time.

精准匹配Precise Matching

根据品牌需求精准筛选达人，确保内容与受众高度契合，最大化传播效果。 Precisely matching creators to brand needs, ensuring content resonates with the right audience and maximizes reach.
